testcase.name: test_30_succeed_31st_returns_429_with_retry_after
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration4.py:133: in test_30_succeed_31st_returns_429_with_retry_after assert r.status_code == 429, f"expected 429, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 429, got 200: {"id":"93bfdaff-b1e5-46fc-961a-7816a4697782","nickname":"TEST_rl","message":"rl","timestamp":"2026-06-27T06:41:20.692000Z","reactions":{"🔥":31}} E assert 200 == 429 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_rate_limit_resets_after_window
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration4.py:158: in test_rate_limit_resets_after_window assert r.status_code == 429 E assert 200 == 429 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
